title: planning-state-v2
description: Single authoritative status/state schema for .planning/state/planning-state-v2.json used by planning_guard.mjs; no Markdown status mirror is required or consumed. Background Phase 0 index job metadata is also stored here under phase_outputs.0.project_index_jobs, so .planning/index-jobs job directories are not used. State remains under CONTROL_ROOT while relative history/... artifact paths resolve under the selected target repo (phase_outputs.0.project_index_root), falling back to the normal project root when no target is selected.

owner.description: Lane execution owner. The Architecture lane is main-agent-owned (GitNexus-direct, no subagent, no launch identity); the Patterns/Constraints/External lanes are subagent-owned.

agent_id.description: Verified subagent identity returned/confirmed by an accepted Agent launch. Required for status=running unless another verified launch identity is present.

launch_id.description: Alternative verified launch identity returned/confirmed after Agent launch acceptance.

attempt_id.description: Launch-attempt identity. For status=running this counts only together with launch_confirmed_at.

launch_confirmed_at.description: Timestamp proving the attempt identity corresponds to an accepted launch rather than a pre-spawn local state flip.

indexJob.description: Authoritative lifecycle record for one background combined Serena + GitNexus index job. Runtime command logs are not persisted as worktree files; a bounded failure log tail may be stored inline.

collected_at.description: Set by index.sh --wait after terminal state is observed.

log_tail.description: Bounded failure-only tail stored inline; no index.log file is created in the worktree.

schema_version.description: Target schema version. 'v2' = canonical phases 0, 1, 1.5, 1.6, 2, 2.5, 3, 4, 5, 7; Phase 0 owns feature-workspace setup and Phase 7 is terminal.

current_phase.description: Phase id. Valid values: 0, 1, 1.5, 1.6, 2, 2.5, 3, 4, 5, 7. Legacy values 4.5, 4.6 trigger legacy mode.

resume_context.description: Explicit resume rehydration gate. Omit or set required=false for continuous in-session planning; set required=true only when a prior planning session was interrupted and must reread source/artifacts before continuing.

mode.description: Lightweight mode relaxes 2.5 approval + 3/4 artifact gates.

phase_outputs.description: Per-phase output records. Canonical keys are phase ids (0, 1, 1.5, 1.6, 2, 2.5, 3, 4, 5, 7) plus named approval/handoff records.

project_index_execution_mode.description: How the combined project index run was executed. Background mode must be collected successfully before Phase 0 completes.

project_index_job_id.description: Background index job id created by .claude/hooks/planning/index.sh --background and keyed in phase_outputs.0.project_index_jobs.

project_index_waited.description: For background mode, true only after index.sh --wait --job <id> observed terminal success and stored collected_at in the same JSON job record.

project_index_jobs.description: Authoritative background index job metadata keyed by safe job id. This replaces loose files under .planning/index-jobs/<job-id>/.

project_index_root.description: Canonical absolute selected target repository root used for the automatic combined Serena + GitNexus index run and, when present, as HISTORY_ROOT for relative history/... planning artifacts.

project_index_control_root.description: Canonical absolute CONTROL_ROOT used for hook, skill, authoritative state, and .mcp.json lookup. It is not the history root when a different target repository is selected.

project_index_anchor_path.description: Canonical absolute source/directory anchor whose repository boundary justified project_index_root.

project_index_root_source.description: Auditable provenance explaining which target-intent signal and boundary rule selected project_index_root.

feature_path.description: Repo-relative feature workspace path; must be history/<feature> and resolve under project_index_root when a target repo is selected, otherwise under the normal project/control root.

requirement_source_path.description: Canonical requirement source currently used by planning. Relative history/... values are target-repo scoped; other relative values retain normal project/control-root resolution.

lanes.description: Coverage ledger for Phase 1 discovery lanes. Immediately after successful Phase 0, the missing/retryable subagent lanes (patterns, constraints, external) launch as background general-purpose agents using the canonical versioned prompt contract; the architecture lane is main-agent-owned (owner=main-agent) and is produced directly with GitNexus, going straight from missing to completed once its canonical file is written. Do not pre-mark a subagent lane running: status=running requires a verified launch identity (agent_id, launch_id, or attempt_id plus launch_confirmed_at). Identity-less running entries are orphaned/retryable rather than permanent duplicate locks. Each lane writes its own canonical detailed Markdown artifact directly; the main agent verifies files, compiles discovery.md, and records state. Phase 1 completes only after all four lane artifacts exist.

1.5.description: Phase 1.5 collects business clarification in exactly 12 questions across 3 AskUserQuestion rounds of 4 questions each.

questions_asked.description: Cumulative count of Phase 1.5 business questions. Normal contract is 12 questions (3 rounds of 4). Optional Round 4 (4 additional questions) is allowed only when unresolved anomaly remains.

rounds.description: Round-by-round Phase 1.5 memory used by semantic hooks to prevent duplicate intent and track ambiguity resolution.

asked_intent_tags.description: Normalized intent tags already asked in prior Phase 1.5 rounds.

anomaly_scan.description: Phase 1.5 anomaly/ambiguity scan summary derived from discovery + prior clarification answers.

optional_round_4_used.description: True only when Phase 1.5 consumed the optional anomaly-resolution Round 4.

requirement_source_path.description: Requirement source selected for this phase when resuming context.

requirement_source_paths.description: Ordered requirement source history used during clarification (oldest→newest).

1.6.description: Phase 1.6 collects test clarification in exactly 8 questions across 2 AskUserQuestion rounds of 4 questions each, including mode-aware evidence planning (fullstack/fe-only/be-only) and FE screenshot checkpoint selection for FE-involving modes, then writes test-scenarios.md.

questions_asked.description: Cumulative count of Phase 1.6 test questions. Increment by 4 after each round. Must reach 8 before completing Phase 1.6.

test_scenarios_path.description: Path to generated test clarification scenarios document.

4_approval.description: Phase 4 gate: one approval after the whole story-map set is complete in full mode.

story_map_path.description: Legacy single story-map path; prefer story_map_paths.

contract_path.description: Legacy single contract path; prefer contract_paths.

story_map_path.description: Legacy single story-map path; prefer story_map_paths.

story_map_paths.description: All story-map files fully covered by real bead decomposition in Phase 5 (one entry per declared phase).

phase_labels.description: Phase labels included in the bead set (for example phase-1, phase-2, ...).
